title: A Fox Under a Pink Moon (EADF2026)

title_lang.en: A Fox Under a Pink Moon (EADF2026)

synopsis:
At just 16, strong-willed Afghan sculptor and illustrator Soraya has been trying for five years to find a way out of Iran and join her mother in Austria. Married to a violent man, she is determined to shape her own future. Directed entirely remotely by Mehrdad Oskouei, this subtly textured self-portrait was filmed by Soraya over five years using her phone. Interweaving chilling escape attempts with her stunning drawings and surreal animations, Soraya pours all her worries, joys, and fears into her art.

 

Best Film Award, IDFA
Grand Award and Youth Jury Award, International Film Festival and Forum on Human Rights
Hot Docs Festival

synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
16歲阿富汗少女索拉雅身處伊朗，面對家暴婚姻與流亡歲月，一心渴望前往奧地利與母親團聚。黑夜漫漫，偷渡集團的威脅、充斥恐懼與暴力的驚險瞬間接踵而至，她以手提電話記錄五年來的逃亡過程。藝術創作是殘酷現實中的救贖與抗爭，她將恐懼與期盼傾注於畫筆，利用沿途收集的廢棄蛋盒與泥土捏製雕塑，幻化作忠實的狐狸、守望的粉紅月亮與微笑小丑。這部交織着驚悚逃亡與超現實動畫的自我肖像，不僅直視難民流離失所的沉重宿命，更展現出無畏的生命力與藝術的力量。

 

阿姆斯特丹國際紀錄片電影節 最佳電影獎
日內瓦國際電影及人權論壇電影節 最佳紀錄片獎及青少年評審獎
加拿大Hot Docs電影節
